query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_hot_12,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bls_max IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_bl_score,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bls_max IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS no_bl_score,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bls_max >= 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS bl_score_gte_40
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id,
    MAX(bls.score) AS bls_max,
    SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sr
  FROM projects p
  JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.rejectionReason IS NULL AND c.crmOrphan = 0
  LEFT JOIN projectBusinessLineScores bls ON bls.projectId = p.id
  WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active' AND (p.suppressed IS NULL OR p.suppressed = 0)
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING sr BETWEEN 1 AND 2
) sub;
